title: Foggerpack
description: A modpack based on the From the Fog horror mod!
body:
# Welcome to Foggerpack!

This modpack is a horror modpack, that adds herobrine, and many other mobs.

Best played with the From the Fog datapack:
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog)

Some notable features are:
- Herobrine
- Weeping Angles
- Zombies can now break blocks and doors and will form hordes to attack players
- The ability to make boats via the Eureka mod
- Airships are disabled
- Making boats is balanced with custom crafting recipes
- Better progression
- Proximity chat with voice chat integration

---

Includes some resource packs:

[Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days)

---

This mod pack was made by a friend group to start a private SMP together, with the gimmick that we are only allowed to communicate with each other via in-game methods, such as the proximity voice/text chat, smoke signals, or some other method.

We would be allowed to message each other via Discord outside the game for example, but only to tell each other to get on the server. Once on, there are no guarantees.

For the best experience, we found that playing with `reduced debug info = true` was the best, as it further increased reliance on in-game methods of travel such as beacons, torch paths, compasses, and maps, which would normally be made entirely redundant by the coordinates on the `F3` menu.

Playing with these rules and with other people is the intended way to play the modpack, but it can be enjoyed in any fashion.

---

## Some Images
![Angel_Statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aJ2wkrj5/images/ac1c6d42f48cb469a03c516e5e4910b536dd8d6f.jpeg)

---

### Other details
If you have any issues, or suggestions for this pack please either join the discord [here](https://discord.gg/9sJvRYQSVD) or create an issue on the github [here](https://github.com/RAMENtheNOODLES/Fogger-Pack/issues)

---
